---
name: Gap / Do / Why
about: The house style — what is missing, what to build, why it matters
title: ""
labels: []
---

## Gap

What is missing or wrong today? Point at files/behavior, not vibes.

## Do

What to build or change. Concrete enough that someone (or a swarm) could pick
it up. Note dependencies on other issues.

## Why

Why this matters — what it unblocks, what risk it closes, what it measures.
